stemHtml: In case of an engine failure with a multi-engine aeroplane, how are the changes from VX to VXSE and from VY to VYSE?

options.a: V<sub>XSE</sub> is higher than V<sub>X</sub> and V<sub>YSE</sub> is lower than V<sub>Y</sub>
options.b: V<sub>XSE</sub> is higher than V<sub>X</sub> and V<sub>YSE</sub> is higher than V<sub>Y</sub>
options.c: V<sub>XSE</sub> is lower than V<sub>X</sub> and V<sub>YSE</sub> is lower than V<sub>Y</sub>
options.d: V<sub>XSE</sub> is lower than V<sub>X</sub> and V<sub>YSE</sub> is higher than V<sub>Y</sub>
